description: Style NoteGo for a look that is bold and beautiful with this handmade necklace from adrika. Its stylish design adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a look that is ethnic yet modern.Product DetailsDark orange multi-strand necklace with dark red, yellow and orange beads, thread buttoned claspMaterial and CareMulti colour glass beads and cotton cordWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of necklace: 68 cm
